text.title: AI-Generated IaC Review Red-Flags Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of ai-generated-iac-review-redflags. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: PR ships `Action: *` on `Resource: *` and merges because the reviewer skimmed.
antipattern.root-cause: No automated gate; review fatigue on long plans.
antipattern.fix: Run validator on every PR; block on high-severity wildcards.

antipattern.symptom: Bucket merged without `public_access_block`; ends up indexed by GrayhatWarfare.
antipattern.root-cause: Agent used an older template that predates 2023 BPA defaults.

antipattern.symptom: Two CI runs apply concurrently; state corrupts.
antipattern.root-cause: DynamoDB lock table missing from backend config.
antipattern.fix: Add lock table to backend; CI rejects backend block without `dynamodb_table`.
